channel.title: Headlines - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

1. Kanye West was booked as a festival headliner. Brands are now pulling their sponsorship  CNN
  2. Kanye offers to meet Jewish community in UK after Wireless controversy  BBC
  3. A music festival booked Kanye West, now known as Ye, and lost major sponsors  NPR
  4. Pressure grows to remove Ye, formerly known as Kanye West, as the headliner of London summer music festival  PBS
  5. David Schwimmer Slams Kanye West's Apology, Urges Remaining Wireless Festival Sponsors to Exit  Rolling Stone

item.title: UCLA storms past South Carolina to claim its 1st NCAA women's basketball title - NPR
item.description:
1. UCLA storms past South Carolina to claim its 1st NCAA women's basketball title  NPR

  5. From The Sports Desk: Bruin beatdown  NBC News

item.title: CBS will hand Colbert’s late-night time slot to ‘Comics Unleashed with Byron Allen’ - CNN
item.description:
1. CBS will hand Colbert’s late-night time slot to ‘Comics Unleashed with Byron Allen’  CNN

  4. CBS to sell late-night hours to Byron Allen as Colbert show ends  Reuters
  5. CBS SHIFTS “COMICS UNLEASHED with BYRON ALLEN” TO 11:35 PM BEGINNING FRIDAY, MAY 22  Paramount Press Express

item.title: Neurocrine to Acquire Soleno Therapeutics, Expanding Its Endocrinology and Rare Disease Portfolio - PR Newswire
item.description:
1. Neurocrine to Acquire Soleno Therapeutics, Expanding Its Endocrinology and Rare Disease Portfolio  PR Newswire
  2. Neurocrine Biosciences Details $2.9B Soleno Buyout, Touts Vykat XR as Potential Blockbuster  Yahoo Finance
  3. Neurocrine Nabs Rare Obesity Disorder Drug in ‘Surprising’ $2.9B Soleno Deal  BioSpace
  4. Neurocrine, eying ‘blockbuster in the making,’ strikes its largest-ever M&A deal with $2.9B Soleno buyout  fiercepharma.com
  5. Neurocrine bets nearly $3bn on deal for insatiable hunger treatment  ft.com

item.title: World Cup MBTA train ticket price announced; T says it will be more affordable than driving - CBS News
item.description:
1. World Cup MBTA train ticket price announced; T says it will be more affordable than driving  CBS News
  2. MBTA to charge $80 for train tickets for World Cup matches at Gillette Stadium  bostonglobe.com
  3. MBTA spikes World Cup tickets to Gillette Stadium to $80 -- four times higher than for Patriots games  Boston Herald
  4. Boston’s World Cup fans facing outrageous 400% increase in train ticket pricing  nypost.com
  5. MBTA to charge $80 for commuter rail tickets for World Cup at Gillette Stadium  WHDH
